title: Toruń, Kuyavian-Pomeranian — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Toruń is a city in Kuyavian-Pomeranian with a population of 201,447. The birthplace of Nicolaus Copernicus, a UNESCO-listed Gothic gem with a stunning medieval Old Town, gingerbread tradition, and a vibrant university atmosphere.
